action: Strengthen browser acoustic evidence with a randomized multi-symbol frequency-time codeword and replay controls.

progress.finding: A full randomized frequency-time codeword is harder for ambient sound to match accidentally than one randomized pulse and can reject incomplete, duplicated, or control-slot replay observations.
progress.verification: 5 deterministic Node tests passed in an isolated runtime using byte-identical pre-commit source.

handoff: Vercel Studio should schedule the codeword from the direct user gesture and require acceptedAsCodewordResponse together with render-position, spectral, and temporal evidence before upgrading the acoustic claim.
limits: No browser, microphone, iPhone Safari, conscious-audibility, or exclusive-causation proof was produced.
